confirm.description: Do you want to start set up?

legacy.description: Enter IP and port-number for your Flashforge 3d Printer. Leave empty to auto discover printer.

new_api.title: Newer FlashForge printer (LAN mode)
new_api.description: On the printer, enable Settings → Network → LAN Mode and note the 8-digit Check Code and serial number, then enter them below.

reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for your printer.

auto_confirm.title: Discovered Flashforge device.
auto_confirm.description: Found printer {machine_name} on {ip_addr}. Do you want to add this printer to Home Assistant?
